Description:
Guides a registered customer through the checkout process.
Actor: Customer
Preconditions: Cart contains at least one item; Customer is authenticated
Success: Order record exists with status PAID and confirmation email sent
Failure: Cart remains intact and no charge is made
KPI: metric=checkout_completion_rate target=95%
Compliance: PCI-DSS

Expectation: Cart summary is displayed with correct totals
Risk: Stale price data may cause discrepancy
Telemetry: CartReviewed, PageViewed

Summary: EnterPaymentDetails: Customer enters payment card details
Description:
Expectation: Payment form validates and tokenises card
Risk: PCI scope expansion if card data is logged
Telemetry: PaymentFormOpened

Expectation: Order record is persisted with status PENDING
Outcome: TransitionTo(OrderConfirmed)
Telemetry: OrderSubmitted

Error path triggered by: PaymentDeclinedError
Steps:
  - NotifyDeclined: System notifies customer of the decline
Resolution: ReturnToStep(EnterPaymentDetails)

Payment card data must never be stored in plaintext
Compliance framework: PCI-DSS
